violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (hashbrown cutter and utensil) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Working containers of oil (in spray bottle) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep units and low boy) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Mop sink faucet was observed in poor repair (leak). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The floors throughout the facility (including walk-in freezer) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (pancakes) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Food product was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. -knifes, -hash brown cutters, -batter dispenser, -waffle maker. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in dish area to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Batter was observed held at 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in freezer for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Frozen bag of soup was observed thawing in hand sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC removed and placed walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Working containers of liquid and dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -prep units, -storage shelfs (including upper and lower shelves), -table under flat tops, -knife holder, -floor mixer shield, -lowboy coolers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Mop sink faucet was observed in poor repair (leak) New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The floors and floor drains throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The outside dumpster is in poor repair. Observed side door missing from dumpster. Per PIC, work order submitted and waiting for new door. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixer blade and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and black residue/debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Units taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The plumbing to the faucet (mop sink) and ice well are in poor repair. Leak and clogging observed. System to be maintain in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
